articles.title: Trump family’s crypto project World Liberty buys $10m ETH
articles.description: Donald Trump-backed crypto project uses dip to buy ETH. Arkham data shows World Liberty Financial bought $10 million of Ethereum’s ETH as prices plummeted. World Liberty Financial, the crypto project backed by U.S President Donald Trump, has scooped another $10 million worth of Ethereum (ETH). The World Liberty wallet has in recent weeks aggressively purchased […] The post Trump family’s...

articles.title: Vitalik Buterin Says Ethereum Future Is Bright, Calls on ETH Community To Double Down on Layer-2s
articles.description: Ethereum creator Vitalik Buterin says the ETH community should be doubling down on layer-2 scaling solutions to strengthen its ecosystem. In a new blog post, Buterin says that it would be a mistake to give up on layer-2s and that developers should instead continue to focus on interoperability, security and blob transactions. Blobs – which […] The post Vitalik Buterin Says Ethereum Future Is...

articles.title: Ripple (XRP) CTO Defends XRPL Decentralization Amid Crypto Reserve Debate
articles.description: The ongoing debate surrounding Ripple, XRP, and the question of decentralization has reached a boiling point. This time, it’s not just a technical argument—it’s entangled in geopolitical tensions and strategic decisions. This could shape the future of the U.S. crypto landscape. articles.title: Ethereum devs and L2 leaders go all in on based and native rollups
